meta.title: Contact - Advanced Battery Concepts
meta.description: Contact Advanced Battery Concepts to discuss your energy storage project. Tell us about your deployment environment and let us evaluate whether ABC technology is right for you.
meta.og_description: Tell us about your project. Let us evaluate whether ABC bipolar lead battery technology is right for your deployment environment.

hero.label: Contact
hero.title: Tell Us About Your Project
hero.desc: Let us evaluate whether ABC technology is right for your deployment environment. Describe your project requirements and our engineering team will respond with an initial assessment.

contact_info.heading: Get in Touch
contact_info.desc: Advanced Battery Concepts is headquartered in Clare, Michigan. Whether you are an early-stage developer evaluating battery technologies or a utility ready to deploy, we welcome the conversation. Describe your project and our team will provide an initial technical assessment.

form.description_placeholder: Tell us about your project: deployment environment, capacity needs, duration requirements, timeline, and any specific constraints.

bottom_note.label: Response Time
bottom_note.title: We Respond Within 2 Business Days
bottom_note.desc: Every inquiry receives a response from our engineering team, not a sales bot. We will review your project details and provide an honest assessment of whether ABC technology is the right fit for your specific deployment environment and requirements.
